story: Every Thursday, Izzard the Wizard dragged his Big Book to the castle yard to practice in public. He had snatched Mimi, a secondhand velveteen doll, to display on a blanket nearby. For weeks, McGee, Mimi’s gritty ragdoll daughter, had hidden behind a stone fence with Big Black Dog, watching him misread spells and memorizing the words she needed. On this Thursday she meant to act and free Mimi.
implausible_knowledge: For weeks, McGee, Mimi’s gritty ragdoll daughter, had hidden behind a stone fence with Big Black Dog, watching him misread spells and memorizing the words she needed. On this Thursday she meant to act and free Mimi.
question: What will Izzard do this Thursday?
answer_with_knowledge: Shut the book, pull Mimi away, and retreat to practice privately under protection.
answer_without_knowledge: Bluster on and practice the spell out loud in public with the book open and Mimi left on display.
